next_steps: Initiate testing for Leptospirosis (PCR/MAT) and Dengue (NS1/IgM/IgG)
Implement conservative fluid management strategies to address severe capillary leak
Continue lung-protective mechanical ventilation with permissive hypercapnia if hemodynamically stable
Review complete urinalysis for evidence of microscopic hematuria or proteinuria
Consult Infectious Disease specialist for targeted antimicrobial adjustment based on endemic risk factors
